{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Relationship Officer",
  "description": "Unified Payment Services Limited is a company set up by a consortium of banks to provide and manage a credible and cost-effective smartcard operation through introducing an alternative method of payment in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Relationship Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;Mainland, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Duties
Merchant Support &amp; Relationship Management:


	Assist in onboarding new merchants across retail, SME, and enterprise segments.
	Support account setup, documentation, KYC compliance, and initial activation of services.
	Maintain regular communication with merchants to ensure satisfaction and proper usage of products and services. 2. Operational &amp; Administrative Support
	Collaborate with internal teams (operations, technology, finance) to support deployment of payment devices (POS, SoftPOS, QR, etc.).
	Track and follow up on merchant activity, transaction volumes, and settlement issues.
	Resolve basic merchant inquiries and escalate more complex issues as needed.


Data &amp; Reporting:


	Maintain accurate records of merchant accounts, engagement activities, and status updates.
	Generate routine reports on merchant activity, onboarding progress, and operational issues
	Gather feedback from merchants and share insights for service improvement.


Product Knowledge &amp; Education


	Stay up to date on company product offerings and ensure merchants understand the value of our solutions.
	Provide onboarding training or demonstrations to merchants on how to use digital payment solutions.


Job Requirements


	Education: Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Finance, Marketing, or a related discipline.
	Experience: Minimum 3 years of relevant work experience in merchant acquisition, customer support, digital payments, or fintech. Post NYSC experience.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@up-ng.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-02",

Business Relationship Officer Job at Unified Payment Services Limited




        
    

        
        Unified Payment Services Limited is a company set up by a consortium of banks to provide and manage a credible and cost-effective smartcard operation through introducing an alternative method of payment in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Relationship Officer

Job Location: Lagos Mainland, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Duties
Merchant Support & Relationship Management:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Assist in onboarding new merchants across retail, SME, and enterprise segments.
	Support account setup, documentation, KYC compliance, and initial activation of services.
	Maintain regular communication with merchants to ensure satisfaction and proper usage of products and services. 2. Operational & Administrative Support
	Collaborate with internal teams (operations, technology, finance) to support deployment of payment devices (POS, SoftPOS, QR, etc.).
	Track and follow up on merchant activity, transaction volumes, and settlement issues.
	Resolve basic merchant inquiries and escalate more complex issues as needed.


Data & Reporting:


	Maintain accurate records of merchant accounts, engagement activities, and status updates.
	Generate routine reports on merchant activity, onboarding progress, and operational issues
	Gather feedback from merchants and share insights for service improvement.


Product Knowledge & Education


	Stay up to date on company product offerings and ensure merchants understand the value of our solutions.
	Provide onboarding training or demonstrations to merchants on how to use digital payment solutions.


Job Requirements


	Education: Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Finance, Marketing, or a related discipline.
	Experience: Minimum 3 years of relevant work experience in merchant acquisition, customer support, digital payments, or fintech. Post NYSC experience.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Accountant",
  "description": "Work Dey HR Services offers a wide range of HR Consulting Services to Organizations and Individuals. We match Suitable ans employable applicants to Genuine Vacancies in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location:&nbsp;Maitama, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Financial reporting: Prepare accurate financial statements and management reports.
	Budget management: Monitor project budgets and ensure cost control.
	Tax compliance: Handle statutory filings and liaise with tax authorities.
	Payroll processing: Manage staff salaries and benefits.
	Audit support: Assist with internal and external audits.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field.
	Professional certification (ACA, ACCA, or equivalent) is an added advantage.
	Minimum of 3 years&rsquo; experience in accounting, preferably in the construction industry.
	Strong knowledge of accounting software and MS Excel.
	Excellent analytical, organizational, and communication skills.


Benefits


	Salary: N200,000 - N300,000 per month.
	Competitive salary package.
	Opportunities for career growth.
	Exposure to diverse and challenging construction projects.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to:&nbsp;career.wsl@gmail.com&nbsp;using &#39;&#39;Application &ndash; Accountant&#39;&#39; as the subject of the email.",

Accountant Job at Work Dey HR Services




        
    

        
        Work Dey HR Services offers a wide range of HR Consulting Services to Organizations and Individuals. We match Suitable ans employable applicants to Genuine Vacancies in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Maitama, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Financial reporting: Prepare accurate financial statements and management reports.
	Budget management: Monitor project budgets and ensure cost control.
	Tax compliance: Handle statutory filings and liaise with tax authorities.
	Payroll processing: Manage staff salaries and benefits.
	Audit support: Assist with internal and external audits.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field.
	Professional certification (ACA, ACCA, or equivalent) is an added advantage.
	Minimum of 3 years’ experience in accounting, preferably in the construction industry.
	Strong knowledge of accounting software and MS Excel.
	Excellent analytical, organizational, and communication skills.


Benefits


	Salary: N200,000 - N300,000 per month.
	Competitive salary package.
	Opportunities for career growth.
	Exposure to diverse and challenging construction projects.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using ''Application – Accountant'' as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Facility Manager",
  "description": "Fusion Facilities commenced operations in 2013 as a business focusing on integrated management services. The vision expanded in 2015 when the Directors decided to adopt a Group structure and focus on the following sectors which are critical to the attainment of man&#39;s physiological and safety needs. Our business outlook currently covers Africa and Europe through our subsidiaries; Fusion Facilities Management Limited (PTY) in South Africa, Fusion Group Management Limited in UAE (Dubai) and Fusion Group Management Limited in UK.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Facility Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

	Candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree with 4 years experience.

Facility Manager Job at Fusion Facilities




        
    

        
        Fusion Facilities commenced operations in 2013 as a business focusing on integrated management services. The vision expanded in 2015 when the Directors decided to adopt a Group structure and focus on the following sectors which are critical to the attainment of man's physiological and safety needs. Our business outlook currently covers Africa and Europe through our subsidiaries; Fusion Facilities Management Limited (PTY) in South Africa, Fusion Group Management Limited in UAE (Dubai) and Fusion Group Management Limited in UK.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Facility Manager

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Qualifications

	Candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree with 4 years experience.
	A skilled facility manager is needed in Abuja to manage a facility.


Method of Application
